pageSubtitle: Full transparency to protect your privacy and rights

hero.title: We protect your privacy and security at every step
hero.summary: At Alpha, we are committed to protecting users, churches, and personal data through security and technical safeguards designed to provide a safe, trusted environment for everyone.

guaranteesIntro: Choose a guarantee to explore how we protect your Alpha experience.

faith.title: Safe Christian environment
faith.summary: A respectful spiritual community with protection against abuse and fake accounts.
points: Block and Report system with report review.
Offensive language detection and graduated automatic penalties.
Temporary suspension for violations and permanent ban for serious cases.
Trust Score, Email Verification, and Church Verification.
Trusted Contact and review of violating accounts.
Suspicious activity detection and limits on new account misuse.

transparency.title: Full transparency
transparency.summary: You have the right to know, manage, and delete your data at any time.
points: Edit your data at any time.
Delete your account or request data deletion.
Review privacy and security policies at any time.

privacy.title: Guaranteed privacy
privacy.summary: Your data is protected — no advertising sharing and no selling to third parties.
points: Personal data is not shared for advertising.
User data is never sold to third parties.
Passwords are encrypted — no one, including the Alpha team, can view them.
Private messages are not visible to priests or churches.

control.title: Full control of your data
control.summary: You control your account, devices, and access recovery methods.
points: Passkeys, Face ID / Touch ID, and two-factor authentication.
Recovery Codes and Trusted Contact Recovery.
Church Verification Recovery and linked device management.
Review sign-in history and sign out from all devices.
Account recovery via email, phone, or Passkeys.

dataProtection.title: How we protect your data
dataProtection.subtitle: Learn what data we collect and how we keep it safe.

summary.title: Access restriction
summary.subtitle: Data access is limited to authorized permissions only.

summary.title: Church isolation
summary.subtitle: Each church sees only its own members — not other churches' data.

summary.title: No advertising sharing
summary.subtitle: Personal data is not shared for advertising purposes.

summary.title: No data selling
summary.subtitle: User data is never sold to any third party.

detailsPoints: Data access is restricted by permissions.
Each church sees only its own members.
Each priest sees only their church's data.
Other churches' data cannot be accessed.
Personal data is not shared for advertising.
User data is never sold to third parties.

detailSectionsIntro: Review privacy and security policies for every part of your experience.

rights.title: Your rights in Alpha
rights.description: Know, edit, delete, and review policies for your data.

blocks.title: Transparency
points: Review privacy and security policies at any time.

messages.title: Message privacy
messages.description: Your private messages are protected and not accessible to churches or priests.

blocks.title: Message privacy
points: Private messages are not visible to priests or churches.
Private messages are not visible to other users.

churches.title: Churches and priests
churches.description: Isolated church data and restricted priest and servant permissions.

blocks.title: Church security
points: Each church's data is isolated from others.
Priest and servant permissions are restricted.

blocks.title: Personal data protection
points: Each church sees only its own members.
Each priest sees only their church's data.
Other churches' data cannot be accessed.

recovery.title: Security and account recovery
recovery.description: Account protection, passwords, devices, and recovery methods.

blocks.title: Password protection
points: Passwords are never stored in plain text.
Secure encryption and processing for passwords.
Priests, churches, and other users cannot view passwords.
The Alpha team cannot view your password.

blocks.title: Devices and sessions
points: See devices linked to your account.

community.title: Community guidelines
community.description: Protecting the community from abuse and fake accounts.

footer.commitment: We are committed to building a safe, trusted platform that respects user and church privacy and provides the highest level of protection while keeping the experience easy to use and spiritually meaningful.
footer.goal: Our goal is for every user to feel that their data, account, and privacy are safe within Alpha.
footer.tagline: Ⲁ — Your digital Coptic home — Ⲱ
